---
name: delivery-prioritization

Base operacional: # Playbook  ## Objective Focus team energy on the highest-value outcomes each delivery cycle.  ## Rules Use quando o pedido envolver: backlog prioritization, sprint scope, essentialism, 80 20, delivery planning.
---

# Delivery Prioritization

## Stack alvo
- Next.js 15+ App Router
- React 19+
- TanStack Query
- shadcn/ui + Tailwind v4
- Monorepo (apps + packages)

## Workflow
1. List candidate work items and expected outcomes.
2. Score impact, effort, risk, and reversibility.
3. Keep top leverage items and cut marginal work.
4. Sequence by dependency and blast radius.
5. Publish final scope, exclusions, and success criteria.

## Saída esperada
1. Ranked priority list with rationale.
2. Explicit out-of-scope list.
3. Recommended execution sequence.
4. Success metric per delivery item.
